market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Ripple secures full MiCA license for crypto services across Europe
articles.description: The Luxembourg approval completes the company's MiCA licensing process, enabling it to provide regulated crypto-asset services across the European Economic Area.

articles.title: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta
articles.description: The update is part of Apple's broader effort to make Siri feel more natural and personal, as it rebuilds the assistant around generative AI.

articles.title: Every major tech layoff in 2026 that has name-checked AI
articles.description: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

articles.title: Amazon competitor Bookshop.org says Kobo eReader support will happen this year after all
articles.description: Bookship.org seemed to delay this anticipated partnership again, but tells TechCrunch that it has settled business terms  and is working on integration.

articles.title: Bitmine announces $74M Ether buys as chair says ‘greater chances of Clarity Act passage’
articles.description: Bitmine's big buy contrasts with crypto treasury peer Strategy, which reported selling millions of dollars worth of its Bitcoin holdings on Monday.

articles.title: UN agency moves Stellar blockchain payment initiative beyond pilot stage
articles.description: The UN Development Programme said blockchain payment pilots in five countries cut costs, improved resilience and will now inform wider use across its humanitarian and development programs.

articles.title: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
articles.description: PSA: A change to Google's privacy settings let it train its AI on more of your data. Here's how to opt out.

articles.title: TeraWulf shares rise after $19B Anthropic AI lease, JV sale
articles.description: The Bitcoin miner signed a 20-year AI infrastructure lease with Anthropic and sold its majority stake in a separate AI data center joint venture.

articles.title: Apple brings back card payments for Apple Account purchases in India after a four-year hiatus
articles.description: Apple has started a phased rollout of card payments for Apple Account purchases in India after adapting to the country's payments framework.

articles.title: Circle’s USDC is leaving Tether behind in the stablecoin volume race, new data from Visa shows
articles.description: As Wall Street banks adopt digital currencies for faster settlements, overall trading volume spiked 63% in just a single month.

articles.title: Strategy selling hundreds of millions worth of bitcoin raises question about its capital-allocation playbook
articles.description: First, it was a tiny amount of bitcoin sales; then, the purchase of several thousand BTC; and finally, today, the unloading of thousands of BTC. What's happening at Strategy?

articles.title: Ethereum developers embrace Vitalik Buterin's long-term vision but urge quicker execution
articles.description: The "Lean Ethereum" strawmap, updated earlier this week, has gained support from many of the network's researchers, though several say the biggest challenge won't be deciding what to build, but how quickly it can happen.

articles.title: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
articles.description: Microsoft cut around 4,800 roles, or 2.1% of its global workforce, on Monday — the latest in a series of layoffs that’s stoking fears of AI replacing jobs. The layoffs will hit Xbox and commercial sales the hardest.

articles.title: Bitcoin price falls up to 4% on Strategy BTC sale as trader sees Summer 2022 repeat
articles.description: Bitcoin wiped out much of its latest gains thanks to a market reaction to Strategy's 3,600 BTC sell-off, but analysis eyed a potential buy announcement in the coming days.

articles.title: Reddit is using LLMs to solve a problem LLMs largely created
articles.description: In the AI era, platforms have no choice but to fight fire with fire to cull spam.

articles.title: 逃過紅巨星吞噬的系外行星，韋伯望遠鏡靠「殘餘熱能」破解不死之謎
articles.description: 數十億年前，一顆類太陽恆星步入死亡，在膨脹為「紅巨星」吞噬周圍行星後，外層瓦解並留下一顆核心殘骸──「白矮星」 […]

articles.title: Securitize eyes acquisitions with $400 million war chest after going public, CEO says
articles.description: Following its NYSE debut, Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo said the firm wants to expand its institutional tokenization platform rather than buy competitors.

articles.title: FCA warns of major shakeup as AI agents meet tokenized money
articles.description: The FCA’s vision for agentic AI points toward a financial system where programmable money and tokenized assets could play a much larger role.

articles.title: DeFi protocol Summer.fi halts Lazy Summer vaults after $6 million exploit
articles.description: The protocol’s SUMR token fell by over 18% after the incident.
